field.title: The tideline.
field.sub: A drifting archive of frames from assignment and travel — Gulf Coast, Brazil, Spain, and the long road between newsrooms.

creative.title: The notebook
creative.subtitle: — essays, in a quieter voice.
creative.intro: Where the reporting ends and the reflecting begins. Personal essays and literary nonfiction, entered through the image that started each one. Tap a frame to read.

social.title: Design for the feed.
social.sub: Graphics, flyers and campaign assets built across three years of social media work for small arts and environmental organizations.
